business_problem: Uniti's customer-care team was answering more than 10,000 monthly billing-related inquiries by manually correlating data across multiple billing, CRM, and operations systems—a high-cost, latency-prone workflow that limited 24/7 self-service for enterprise telecom customers.
solution_summary: Uniti Group, a telecommunications company managing 10K+ monthly billing-related customer inquiries, consolidated billing, CRM, and operational data into Oracle Autonomous AI Database and deployed a 24/7 generative-AI chatbot powered by OCI Generative AI and Oracle AI Vector Search to deflect call-center load. The chatbot answers customer and agent queries in natural language, grounding every response in authoritative billing data via vector search indexes, reducing manual data correlation by agents and enabling self-service billing support.
business_outcome: Uniti deflected billing-related call-center load with a 24/7 chatbot, reduced manual data correlation by agents, and delivered self-service answers grounded in Uniti's authoritative billing data via AI Vector Search.
architecture_clues: Oracle Autonomous AI Database as unified data platform
AI Vector Search co-located with operational data—no separate vector store
OCI Generative AI for chatbot LLM
Chatbot for both customers and internal customer-care agents
evidence_quotes: Uniti uses Oracle Autonomous AI Database with AI Vector Search and OCI Generative AI to provide 24/7 self-service answers to more than 10,000 monthly billing-related customer inquiries.
The chatbot grounds every answer in Uniti's authoritative billing, CRM, and operational data.

solution_components.name: Oracle Autonomous AI Database
solution_components.role: Unified data platform consolidating billing, CRM, and operational data; hosts AI Vector Search indexes for semantic FAQ and documentation search.

solution_components.name: Oracle AI Vector Search
solution_components.role: Semantic search engine for FAQ, billing policies, and documentation; embedded in Autonomous Database; enables AI chatbot to ground answers in authoritative data.

solution_components.name: OCI Generative AI
solution_components.role: Large language model service powering chatbot conversational reasoning and natural language understanding; delivers 24/7 self-service support.
